long_description:
Coles Finest All Butter Croissants 2 pack

  • Golden flaky pastry
  • Ready in 5 minutes
  • No artificial colours and flavours

Light, flaky, perfectly crisp and buttery. There are few better ways to start the morning than with croissants fresh out of the oven. Coles Finest All Butter Croissants are patisserie-inspired and cafe quality, golden on the outside and soft and delicately layered on the inside.

You can enjoy Coles Finest All Butter Croissants straight from the pack or pop them into the oven for 4-5 minutes until crisp and warm. Top with mascarpone and jam for a delicious continental style breakfast that's perfect with a strong espresso.

Coles Finest All Butter Croissants are also great stand-ins for sandwiches and can be filled with things like spinach, tomato and avocado and make the most mouthwatering toasties with ham and cheese under the grill. Coles Finest All Butter Croissants are made in Australia from at least 72% Australian ingredients. They contain no artificial colours and flavours and contribute to the production of sustainable palm oil.
name: All Butter Croissants 2 Pack

long_description:
Coles Finest Pain au Chocolat Croissants 160g.





  • All-butter flaky pastry

  • 2 pack

  • No artificial colours and flavours




These expertly crafted Coles Finest Pain au Chocolat Croissants are light, flaky, perfectly crisp and buttery. Patisserie-inspired and cafe quality, they're golden on the outside and soft and delicately layered on the inside with a luscious dark chocolate centre that melts in your mouth. Just pop Coles Finest Pain au Chocolat Croissants into the oven or air fryer for around 5 minutes then enjoy with a strong espresso or cup of fragrant tea. Or why not elevate the experience and add a swirl of velvety whipped cream for an extra touch of decadence and finish with a sprinkling of fresh raspberries. Coles Finest Pain au Chocolat Croissants also contain no artificial colours and flavours and are suitable for vegetarians.

Tip Top English Muffins Original are all about homegrown goodness. That's why we bake every day with Aussie wheat. We partner with Foodbank to share goodness with the community, and we use more sustainable packaging wherever we can so Australia stays beautiful for generations to come. These soft and tasty muffins are 97% fat free, a source of fibre and made with Aussie wheat, with no artificial colours or flavours.

long_description: Made softer, naturally. Enjoy a cafe style meal from the comfort of your home with Mighty Soft Extra Thick Cut Raisin Toast. Full of juicy raisins, enjoy this loaf straight from the pack or toasted. Mighty Soft Raisin Toast is bursting with sweet, fruity flavours and aromatic spices. Each slice is crafted with love for a delicious loaf containing no artificial preservatives. it's the perfect treat morning, noon and night. Toast and drizzle with your favourite syrup for a homestyle sweet treat. Made with 25% real fruit   perfect for breakfast, lunch or an after school snack   OUR EXTRA THICK CAFE STYLE RAISIN TOAST IS BURSTING WITH SWEET AND JUICY FRUIT, & AROMATIC SPICES Enjoy a cafe style meal from home with Mighty Soft Cafe Style Extra Thick Cut Raisin Toast Loaf. A tasty combo of soft bread and fruit bits.

long_description:
Start the day right with our delicious Tip Top Raisin Toast. Naturally sweetened with tasty raisins, and with no added nasties, you can relax and enjoy every last bite!
Tip Top is all about home-grown goodness.
That's why we bake every day with Aussie wheat.
We partner with Foodbank to share goodness with the community.
And we use more sustainable packaging whenever we can, so Australia stays beautiful for generations to come.

long_description:
Cadbury Mini Rolls are choc-full of deliciousness! Each mini roll has a moist chocolate sponge cake with a vanilla flavour filling, all coated in a layer of famously smooth Cadbury milk chocolate. Suitable for vegetarians, these Mini Rolls are individually wrapped, making them ideal for a lunch box, family picnics, on-the-go snacks or popping into your bag for a tasty tea break. Deliciously simple and simply delicious, these cakes are best stored in a cool, dry place, ready to grab when you fancy a sweet treat. This pack contains five delicious Mini Rolls, but if you just can't get enough, why not try our Cadbury Raspberry Mini Rolls too?
  • Coated in deliciously smooth Cadbury milk chocolate

  • As a snack with tea or coffee or as a treat with lunch

  • Individually wrapped for convenience

  • A great lunch box treat

  • Suitable for vegetarians

Grab a Cadbury Milk Chocolate Cake Bar for a delicious chocolatey treat. These cake bars are made from fluffy chocolate sponge cake with a smooth layer of chocolate, fully coated in an indulgent layer of Cadbury Milk Chocolate.

They're suitable for vegetarians and come in a pack of five, so they're perfect for sharing with friends and family or putting out at parties.

Each bar is individually wrapped for freshness, making them ideal for popping in lunchboxes or taking as an on-the-go treat.

Indulge in the delicate and charming taste of Mr Kipling French Fancies Cakes. These delicious cakes have a light and fluffy golden sponge that melts in the mouth, topped with creamy vanilla filling and enrobed in soft fondant icing. Baked with 100% natural flavours and no artificial colours, these timeless are exceedingly good cakes and irresistibly moreish.

With 8 French Fancies in a pack, each delightful small cake is perfectly sized for any occasion, offering a burst of sweetness and a touch of luxury in every bite. These Mr Kipling French Fancies Cakes are ideal for treating guests at parties, sharing with friends and family, or simply enjoying alongside a well-deserved cup of tea.

  • Exceedingly Good Cakes

  • Expertly crafted patisserie cakes

long_description:
Make Every Day Delicious

Enjoy delightful layers of lemon sponge cake, sandwiched with a heavenly lemon flavoured filling, and topped with luscious lemon flavoured icing for the perfect finishing touch. Each delicious lemon cake slice is crafted with 100% natural flavours, no hydrogenated fat and no artificial colours, creating a great tasting cake slice that's sure to hit the spot.

These exceedingly good cakes truly are a heavenly snack with a nostalgic charm. This pack contains 6 individually wrapped cake slices, perfectly sized for any occasion. Ideal for lunchboxes, on-the-go snacking, sharing with friends and family, or simply enjoying with a well-deserved cup of tea. Exceedingly good, effortlessly delicious.

  • Exceedingly Good Cakes

  • No Artificial Flavours

  • No Artificial Colours

  • Perfect lunchbox or on the go treat

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Expertly crafted patisserie cakes.

long_description:
Bite into the light buttery crunch of two melt-in-the-mouth biscuity shortcake whirls, where you'll discover a delightful treat of smooth vanilla-flavour crme fused with luscious raspberry jam. It's the everyday things, the little things, that's what we really cherish most.

Why not tuck into your Shortcake Whirls with afternoon tea? These delicious treats are perfect for sharing with friends and family or as a sweet treat to savour after your meal or after work.

It's the little things that mean the most like an exceedingly good cake from Mr Kipling.

  • No Artificial Colours

  • No Artificial Flavours

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Exceedingly Good Cakes

  • Expertly Crafted Patisserie Cakes
name: Whirls Raspberry & Creme

long_description:
Coles Orange and Poppyseed Cake 400g 5 Serves


  • Zesty orange sponge cake
  • Topped with creamy icing and poppyseeds
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Orange and Poppyseed Cake features a light and zesty orange sponge cake topped with a smooth, creamy icing and finished with a sprinkling of poppyseeds throughout.


It's perfect for special occasions or for those times when you feel like a little something sweet after lunch or dinner. The zesty citrus flavours in Coles Orange and Poppyseed Cake pair perfectly with coffee and fragrant teas like chamomile or earl grey so it's great for morning or afternoon teas and is always a popular choice whether you're sharing it with work colleagues or family and friends.


Coles Orange and Poppyseed Cake is made in Australia from at least 82% Australian ingredients. It has no artificial colours and flavours and is Rainforest Alliance approved.

long_description:
Pinsa Di Roma is a Roman-style pizza known for its light, airy texture and digestibility, made using a hand-pressed sourdough with 80% hydration and 48-hour fermentation.

It delivers a truly unique customer experience and is rapidly gaining popularity.

Pinsa Di Roma features:
...

  • Light and airy texture

  • 48-hour fermentation

  • 80% Hydration

  • Hand-pressed sourdough

  • Stone Baked

  • Hand Crafted.

  • Easy to Digest.

  • Virgin Olive Oil.

long_description:
†45% less sodium compared to other leading brands that represent the average top 80% of the wraps market (566mg/100g January 2023).

At Helga's, we believe generosity starts with the finest ingredients, crafted by real bakers every day.
Our sourdough is a classic. The magic is in the fermented rye sourdough. We only use Australian wheat flour because we think it's the best in the world. We take our time to blend and rest the dough. And then we bake. And now here it is. In your hands. We hope you love eating it as much as we loved baking it for you.

Helga's bakers begin with care by selecting the best quality ingredients, those that bring out the best taste in each other. From mixing, proving, pressing and baking, we allow their true flavours to shine through in our wraps.

- Lower in Sodium (25% less sodium than other leading brands compared to 540mg/100g average for 80% of the wraps market (February 2021)).
- Source of Fibre
- Source of Protein
- 60% of your whole grain, daily target intake (One serve (1 wrap) of Helga's Wholemeal Wraps contributes 60% towards the Grains & Legumes Nutrition Council 48g whole grain Daily Target Intake).
- Suitable for Vegans
- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives
- No added sugar

^One serve (1 wrap) of Helga's Wholemeal Wraps contributes 60% towards the Grains & Legumes Nutrition Council 48g Whole Grain Daily Target Intake.

Lower In Sodium 

 35% less sodium compared to other leading brands that represent the average top 80% of the wraps market (566mg/100g January 2023).

At Helga's, we believe generosity starts with the finest ingredients, crafted by real bakers every day. Our wholemeal wrap is a classic, with just the right amount of wholesome goodness. And now here it is. In your hands. We hope you love eating it as much as we loved baking it for you.
name: Wholemeal Wraps 8 Pack

long_description: Coles Finest by Laurent is proudly made in Australia using Australian flour. It is crafted over 33 hours starting with adding Laurent's unique 30 year old Sour Dough culture, mixing the dough, allowing it to rest and ferment, and baking it on specialised hot stone. This creates a unique and delicious bread that has a soft and light internal texture and a satisfying crispy crust on the outside.

Freshmatic Auto Spray Refill

description: AIR WICK AUTOMATIC FRESHMATIC REFILL APPLE BLOSSOM & FRESH COTTON 228ML
long_description:
Air Wick 24/7 Odour Neutralising Automatic Spray is an aerosol-free continuous air freshener refill designed to tackle malodour within your living, kitchen & bathroom with its odour neutralising molecules to make your home smell fresh for up to 70 days*

Infused with natural essential oils, Air Wick 24/7 Odour Neutralising Automatic Spray has a 95% naturally derived formula and is free from propellant & intentionally added dyes.

With adjustable intensity control settings, you can choose and control the fragrance intensity. For an extra boost of freshness use the boost button at the top of the device.

Both, Air Wick and Botanica by Air Wick aerosol-free automatic spray refills are compatible with Air Wick 24/7 Odour Neutralising Automatic Spray devices and are available in a variety of scents.

* based on lowest intensity setting 
  • - 24/7 Odour Neutralising is an effective solution to neutralise odours automatically at home

  • - Each refill provides continuous freshness for up to 70 days* *based on lowest intensity setting (excludes BOOST button use)

  • - Fragrance infused with natural essential oils

  • - Aerosol-free with 95% naturally derived ingredients free from propellant & intentionally added dyes

  • - Compatible with Air Wick and Botanica by Air Wick aerosol-free automatic spray devices
name: Aerosol-free Automatic Spray Refill Apple Blossom & Fresh Cotton

description: BOTANICA ORIGINS REED DIFFUSER MADAGASCAN VANILLA 85ML
long_description:
On the verdant foothills of Madagascar, delicate vanilla orchids creep through morning mists. There they are carefully nurtured: hand pollinated and picked by skilled and attentive farmers. 
 
This fragrant tropical treasure, bursts with intoxicating creamy sweetness. Soaked in the sun and cured for up to 4 months to create the perfect quality ‘absolut'. 
 
Through their responsible vanilla initiative, our suppliers work in partnership with farming cooperatives and leading experts in vanilla farming and processing.

Air Wick's aroma diffuser glows as it mists and brings amazing fragrance to your bedroom, living room or home office, for up to 45 days*. Experience fragrance control with the 8-hour on and 16-hour off cycle and the four fragrance settings to adjust the intensity and frequency of the mist.  
  
*based on lowest intensity setting 
  
Air Wick Essential Mist Diffuser is portable and easy to use as every refill is ready to use without the need to add water. Refills are compatible with all existing Air Wick Essential Mist devices and are available in a variety of scents. 
  • Prepare your room for comfort with the scent of Relaxing Lavender, Eucalyptus & Sage

  • Use with Air Wick's portable and battery-operated aroma diffuser that glows as it mists

  • Each refill is ready to use and lasts for up to 45 days* *on lowest intensity setting

  • With fragrance infused with essential oils

  • For use with Air Wick Essential Mist Diffuser
name: Essential Mist Peace Lavender-eucalyptus & Sage Diffuser Refill

description: BOTANICA ORIGINS CANDLE FRENCH CLARY SAGE
long_description:
On sunny August days; across the rolling foothills of the Provence region of south-eastern France; these short-lived, fragile and aromatic herbs colour the landscape a delicate pale purple. 
 
Lovingly protected from the elements by its farmers to preserve its aromatic, fresh, fruity brightness. Carefully cut, in the traditional way, then left to dry in the field before distilling the flowers and stems into the highly prized, precious oil. 
 
Good transparency in our supply chain means our suppliers work directly with farmers and distillers at the source to understand the fragility of and help to mitigate the risks to their precious crop. 
  • Fragrance profile: aromatic, fresh, fruity, clary sage

  • Fragrance infused with responsibly sourced natural ingredients

  • Lasts for up to 50 hours

  • Free from added dyes.
name: Origins Candle French Clary Sage

description: BOTANICA ORIGINS SCENTED CANDLE MADAGASCAN VANILLA
long_description:
On the verdant foothills of Madagascar, delicate vanilla orchids creep through morning mists. There they are carefully nurtured: hand pollinated and picked by skilled and attentive farmers. 
 
This fragrant tropical treasure, bursts with intoxicating creamy sweetness. Soaked in the sun and cured for up to 4 months to create the perfect quality ‘absolut'. 
 
Through their responsible vanilla initiative, our suppliers work in partnership with farming cooperatives and leading experts in vanilla farming and processing.
  • Fragrance profile: Madagascan vanilla, tropical treasures

  • Fragrance infused with responsibly sourced natural ingredients

  • Lasts for up to 50 hours

  • Free from added dyes
name: Origins Scented Candle Madagascan Vanilla

description: BOTANICA BY AIR WICK PLUG- IN DIFFUSER + REFILL COCONUT MILK & INDONESIAN PATCHOULI 1 PACK
long_description:
All of our Botanica fragrances are infused with exotic natural ingredients, carefully sourced in a way that respects our planet. Long lasting fragrance for up to 140 days*.

 

* Based on 12 hours daily usage on minimum setting

Indulge in the decadence of creamy coconut, embraced with revitalising notes of patchouli and a touch of sweet florals.

 

The patchouli oil infused within this fragrance is responsibly sourced from the island of Sulawesi, Indonesia, carefully harvested to protect this rich and indulgent scent.

 
  • Lasts up to 140 days per refill* for long lasting nature-inspired fragrance in your home * Based on 12 hours daily usage on minimum setting

  • - Responsibly sourced natural ingredients.

  • - Great fragrance: 100% fragrance, infused with essential oils.

  • - Free from intentionally added dyes.
name: By Air Wick Air Plug In Diffuser Refill Coconut Milk & Indonesian Patchouli

description: BOTANICA BY AIR WICK PLUG- IN DIFFUSER REFILL VANILLA & HIMALAYAN MAGNOLIA 2 X 22ML
long_description:
All of our Botanica fragrances are infused with exotic natural ingredients, carefully sourced in a way that respects our planet. Long lasting fragrance for up to 140 days*.

 

* Based on 12 hours daily usage on minimum setting

An indulgent and sweet fragrance of sub-drenched magnolia freshly harvested from the Himalayas married with creamy vanilla and a touch of sweet honey, peach and coconut.


The magnolia essential oil in this fragrance is responsibly hand-picked and harvested in small batches from the rolling hills of the Himalayas. Fill your home with the true-to-nature experience of Botanica vanilla & Himalayan magnolia.
  • - Lasts up to 280 days* for long lasting nature-inspired fragrance in your home *For 2 refills, based on 12 hours daily usage on minimum setting

  • - Responsibly sourced natural ingredients.

name: By Air Wick Plug In Diffuser Refill Vanilla Himalayan Magnolia 2x22ml

description: AIR WICK AEROSOL- FREE AUTOMATIC SPRAY & REFILL ISLAND BREEZE 228ML
long_description:
Air Wick 24/7 Odour Neutralising Automatic Spray is an aerosol-free continuous air freshener designed  to tackle malodour within your living, kitchen & bathroom with its odour neutralising molecules to make your home smell fresh for up to 70 days*

With fragrance infused with natural essential oils, Air Wick 24/7 Odour Neutralising Automatic Spray has a 95% naturally derived formula and is free from propellant & intentionally added dyes.

With adjustable intensity control settings, you can choose and control the fragrance intensity. For an extra boost of freshness use the boost button at the top of the device.

Both, Air Wick and Botanica by Air Wick aerosol-free automatic spray refills are compatible with Air Wick 24/7 Odour Neutralising Automatic Spray devices and are available in a variety of scents.

*based on lowest intensity setting (excludes boost button use) 
  • - 24/7 Odour Neutralising is an effective solution to neutralise odours automatically at home

  • - For continuous freshness for up to 70 days* *based on lowest intensity setting (excludes BOOST button use)

  • - Fragrance infused with natural essential oils

  • - 95% naturally derived ingredients, and free from propellant & intentionally added dyes

  • - Includes device, refill and batteries
name: Aerosol- Free Automatic Spray & Refill Island Breeze

From Black Swan's vibrant market roots comes its trusted, delicious Favourites range; a celebration of fresh produce, an abundance of sensational flavours and a passion for creating and togetherness. Good health changes everything-support your rest and recovery with Blackmores Deep Sleep. This herbal blend combines valerian, hops, and ziziphus-traditionally used in Chinese and Western herbal medicine to relieve sleeplessness and promote deep, restorative sleep. It's formulated to enhance sleep quality and help maintain healthy sleeping patterns, while also calming the mind and soothing nervous tension. Valerian is used to reduce the time to fall asleep and support refreshing sleep, while ziziphus has long been recognised for its calming properties. Together, these ingredients help maintain nervous system function and assist mind relaxation. This product offers natural support for quality sleep and general wellbeing.
  • Improves sleep quality.

  • Relieves restless sleep and supports waking up refreshed.

  • A targeted herbal and mineral supplement approach to help promote deep and restful sleep, contains Magnesium, Valerian, Ziziphus and Hops.

  • Support general health and wellbeing.

description: BREF DELUXE TOILET CLEANER RIM BLOCK LOVELY JASMINE 50G X 2 PACK
long_description:
Bref Deluxe Disposable Toilet Bowl Cleaner (2x 50g) - Toilet rim block with Lovely Jasmine scent

Give your bathroom a luxurious feel with Bref's Deluxe hanging toilet bowl cleaner. Our toilet flush cleaner not only deep cleans your loo with each flush, it also releases a signature Lovely Jasmine scent. This bref toilet freshener is a simple way to upgrade your toilet and bathroom.

Bref Deluxe's strong toilet stain remover consists of a 4-function formula with patented technology:

Power foam -clean the toilet with every flush
Grime removal
Stain protection - prevents new stains from forming
Extra freshness - leaves a long lasting fresh scent in the bathroom

Bref Deluxe is incredibly simple to use. Simply hang it on the rim of your toilet bowl where the water flow is strongest. As a toilet foaming cleanser, Bref Deluxe doesn't just clean tough toilet stains, it prevents new stains from sticking.

Check out the other variants in the Bref toilet cleaner collection, Midnight Bouquet and Delicate Magnolia, to discover new scent sensations.

Together for a cleaner world - We use 100% renewable electricity at our production plant, where we have zero production waste to landfills. The blister packaging is made of 98% recycled plastic and the basket is made of 30% recycled plastic. The carton and basket are recyclable. To recycle the carton, simply separate it from the blister package.
  • Toilet care - Transform your bathroom with the Lovely Jasmine scent of this toilet cleaner block, inspired by award-winning fragrances to leave your bowl sparkling after every flush

  • Luxurious scent experience - This toilet rim cleaner is like a perfume for the toilet, elevated with elegant scents. The scent in this toilet cleaner is activated with each flush and made to last

  • 4-Function Formula - This automatic toilet bowl cleaner is designed to deliver enhanced freshness and cleanliness, including a 4-in-1 formula: luxurious fragrance, active cleaning foam, grime removal effect and dirt protection

  • Sustainable packaging - The blister packaging is made of 98% recycled plastic and with 100% renewable energy at the production plant. The basket of this septic safe toilet cleaner is made of 30% recycled plastic

  • Easy to use - Simply separate the carton from the blister bubble and hang the toilet bowl freshener on the rim of the toilet where the water flow is best
name: Deluxe Toilet Cleaner Rim Block Lovely Jasmine 2x50g

ingredients: Refer to www.henkel.com.au for full information
long_description:
Cold Power Laundry Liquid Sensitive - Experience outstanding results even in cold water and short cycles, with ingredients that are gentle on skin.

Cold Power Laundry Liquid Sensitive offers an effective stain removal formula specifically developed for cold water washes, with an improved level of sensitive skin care and protection. This sensitive laundry detergent has a dermatologically tested formula, containing no fragrance, dyes or enzymes, making it a great baby laundry detergent or those with sensitive skin.

Save energy on every wash with Cold Power, coming in 100% recyclable packaging* and containing 92% biodegradable ingredients**
  • Cold Power Formula: Get outstanding results with this dermatologically tested laundry liquid, the effective formula removes stains and is kind to your skin.

  • Effective in Cold Water: Cold Power Laundry Liquid Sensitive has an effective stain removal formula that provides outstanding results even in cold water and with ingredients that are gentle on skin

  • Gentle Formula: This fragrance free laundry detergent is dermatologically tested and is kind on your skin and clothes thanks to reduced potential irritants, making it a great baby laundry detergent or for those with sensitive skin - no fragrance, dyes or enzymes

  • More Sustainable: Effective in short cold wash cycles, using less energy and reducing its environmental impact for sustainable performance

  • For a Cleaner World: This Cold Power laundry detergent saves energy on every wash - it comes in 100% recyclable packaging* and contains 92% biodegradable ingredients**, making it greywater and septic safe

  • Suitable for Front and Top loader washing machines.

  • *when recycling services are available **Related to organic ingredients, according to OECD 301/302.
name: Laundry Liquid Sensitive

description: COLD POWER LAUNDRY LIQUID WITH A TOUCH OF FABRIC SOFTENER 2L
ingredients: This product contains less than 0.5% phosphorus. For ingredients refer to www.coldpower.com.au for full information.
long_description:
Cold Power Laundry Detergent Liquid with a Touch of Fabric Softener (2L) - For outstanding results and freshly fragrant clothes with fewer wrinkles.

Experience effective stain removal and freshly fragrant laundry even in cold water with this Cold Power washing liquid with added fabric softener. The unique cold water enzyme technology is designed to effectively remove tough stains in cold water so you can enjoy visibly clean laundry with anti-wrinkle and easy iron added benefits from wash to wear.
Cold water washing saves up to 80% less energy*, therefore reducing the environmental impact of you doing your laundry while being gentler on your clothes.
How to use: Recommended dosage 50ml washing detergent for a normal load. For heavy soiling, use 75ml. For handwashing and soaking, use 25ml per 5 litres of water and soak for at least 30 minutes or overnight.

This laundry product is Australian-made and contains less than 0.5% phosphorus. The detergent bottle is made from 75% recycled material and both bottle and cap are recyclable. Made with 92% biodegradable ingredients** and greywater septic safe.

Product benefits at a glance:
Effective stain removal
Experience freshly fragranced clothes with fewer wrinkles
Unique cold water enzyme formula
Suitable for front loader and top loader washing machines
For approx. 40 washloads
Bottle made from 75% recycled plastic

*when switching from warm to cold water
**Related to organic ingredients according to OECD 301/302
  • Touch Of Fabric Softener: Combines outstanding clean in even cold water with fabric softening benefits to leave you with freshly fragrant clothes and fewer wrinkles

  • Effective Stain Removal: With its cold water laundry detergent enzyme, this Cold Power laundry liquid effectively removes tough stains, so you can enjoy visibly clean laundry

  • More Sustainable: Washing your clothes in cold water saves up to 80% less energy*, helping to reduce the environmental impact whilst being gentler on your clothes

  • Better For The Planet: The laundy detergent features packaging made from 75% Australian recycled plastic, contains 92% biodegradable ingredients** and is also greywater septic safe

  • Proudly Made In Australia: Cold Power Laundry Detergent Liquid with a Touch of Fabric Softener (2L) lasts for approx. 40 washloads and is made by the Australian cold water experts
name: Laundry Liquid With A Touch Of Fabric Softener

ingredients: Refer to www.henkel.com.au for full information
long_description:
Cold Power Advanced Clean Laundry Detergent Capsules (29 Washes) - For outstanding results in cold water.

Discover outstanding clean in cold water, the easy way with these advanced clean triple washing detergent capsules from Cold Power. The three-in-one formula of these laundry capsules delivers outstanding stain removal even in cold water while offering a fresh scent and brightness so you can enjoy visibly clean laundry that smells fresh and clean.
Cold water washing saves up to 80% less energy, therefore reducing the environmental impact of you doing your laundry while being gentler on your clothes.

How to use: Recommended dosage is one capsule per load or 2 capsules for heavy loads. First place the washing detergent capsules directly into the empty drum, then add clothes on top of the capsule. Do not place in dispensing drawer. Not suitable for hand wash.

These washing detergent capsules use 90% less water in production**, are made with 92% biodegradable ingredients#, contain less than 0.5% phosphorus, and are also greywater septic safe. Keep out of sight and reach of children.

Product benefits at a glance:
Effective stain removal
Outstanding clean
Fresh scent
Unique cold water enzyme formula
Suitable for front loader and top loader washing machines
For approx. 29 washloads

when switching from warm to cold water

How to use: Recommended dosage 50ml washing detergent for a normal load. For heavy soiling, use 75ml. For handwashing and soaking, use 25ml per 5 litres of water and soak for at least 30 minutes or overnight.

Coles Finest French Petit Fours 223g


  • A selection of mini tarts, éclairs, and cakes
  • 16 pieces
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. This exquisite selection of Coles Finest French Petits Fours features 16 mini desserts that have been expertly crafted in France. The selection includes 4 zesty lemon tartlets, 4 indulgent mini chocolate éclairs, 4 delicate raspberry financiers and 4 rich opera cakes. The perfect bite-sized creations for any special occasion. Coles Finest French Petit Fours are made with premium ingredients and balanced flavours making them enticing little treats for all ages. And while they're usually served at the end of the meal, they also make a great addition to dessert platters and high teas.


Coles Finest French Petit Fours not only taste great, they're also free from artificial colours and flavours.

long_description:
Coles Finest French Apple Tatin Tartlets 300g


  • 2 pack
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. Experience the difference of Coles Finest French Apple Tatin Tartlets, expertly crafted in France. This classic dessert has a golden, all-butter shortbread base, topped with juicy apple slices and finished with a luscious, rich caramel sauce. Sweet and elegant and totally moreish.


Coles Finest French Apple Tatin Tartlets are made without artificial colours and flavours and come in a convenient pack of 2 so they're great for sharing. They keep in the freezer and bake from frozen in the oven in just 15 minutes so they're always on hand when you need a quick dessert or afternoon sweet treat. You can also pop them in the microwave for 2 minutes until warmed through. Then serve Coles Finest French Apple Tatin Tartlets with a big scoop of vanilla ice cream for added luxury, or pair with a dollop of creme fraiche to balance the sweetness of the caramel.

This creates a unique and delicious bread that has a soft and light internal texture and a satisfying crispy crust on the outside.

Coles Finest Triple Chocolate Yule Log 470g





  • Triple chocolate buche

  • Serves 8

  • No artificial colours and flavours




Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. This Coles Finest Triple Chocolate Yule Log is a true showstopper for any occasion. Expertly crafted in France it's made with delicate layers of rich cocoa biscuit, milk chocolate crunch and velvety dark and white chocolate mousse then finished with a decadent tempered chocolate coating.




Coles Finest Triple Chocolate Yule Log is a traditional festive dessert that originated in France and is typically enjoyed during the holiday season. To serve, simply defrost and add a dusting of icing sugar "snow" for a stunning centrepiece that looks great and tastes even better. Pair a slice with a tumbler of eggnog or a glass of champagne for an extra indulgent experience.




Coles Finest Triple Chocolate Yule Log is also free from artificial colours and flavours.

long_description:
Coles Finest French Lemon Meringue Tarts 2 pack. 195g


  • Lemon meringue tartlets
  • Made in France
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. These delicious Coles Finest French Lemon Meringue Tarts have been expertly crafted in France and feature a golden, all-butter shortbread base filled with a layer of tangy lemon curd and topped with marshmallowy meringue before being delicately torched to perfection. They're sweet and tart and totally moreish. Coles Finest French Lemon Meringue Tarts keep in the freezer so they're always on hand when you need a quick yet elegant dessert or afternoon sweet treat. Simply place on a plate or serving tray to thaw in the refrigerator before serving. You can add some candied lemon slices on top for a bit of extra zest and panache if you like.


Great for sharing, Coles Finest French Lemon Meringue Tarts come in a convenient pack of 2 and are made without artificial colours and flavours.

long_description:
• Made with 85% premium dark chocolate 
  • Rainforest Alliance-approved cocoa 
  • Crafted in Belgium

Coles Finest Belgian Dark Chocolate is one for the serious chocolate connoisseur. It’s crafted in Belgium to a traditional recipe by a fourth-generation Belgian chocolatier and it has a rich, warm, slightly bittersweet flavour. And while a luxurious block of Coles Finest Belgian Dark Chocolate is technically perfect for sharing – we understand if you just want to keep it all to yourself. 

Not only is this premium dark chocolate silky and delicious, it’s also Rainforest Alliance approved, meaning it was produced using methods that support social, economic and environmental sustainability. 

Serving suggestion: The deep, rich flavour of Coles Finest Belgian Dark Chocolate goes perfectly alongside a strong espresso or a dry red wine. It can even make an unexpected addition to a cheese board as it goes especially well with a funky blue cheese. Or you can go old school and make a silky chocolate fondue for your next retro dinner party.

long_description:
Coles Finest Dark Chocolate Mint Thins 135g


  • Dark chocolate thins with peppermint fondant
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. These indulgent Coles Finest Dark Chocolate Mint Thins have been expertly crafted in the UK by chocolatiers boasting over 60 years of experience. They're made with a premium dark chocolate shell that cracks to reveal a gooey peppermint fondant centre. Precise tempering gives the chocolate its signature snap and silky texture that perfectly complements the refreshing, smooth peppermint filling.


Ideal for after-dinner or to accompany a strong espresso or digestif, Coles Finest Dark Chocolate Mint Thins are the ideal end to any good meal. Coles Finest Dark Chocolate Mint Thins not only taste great, they're free from artificial colours and flavours.

description: COLES FINEST PURE CANADIAN MAPLE SYRUP
ingredients: 100% Pure Maple Syrup.
long_description: Quebec is famous for producing the best pure maple syrup in Canada - we might say, this is one of our finest discoveries. With creamy caramel and toffee notes, it smells as sweet as it tastes. Our Coles Finest Pure Canadian Maple Syrup is 100% pure maple syrup, from the maple forests of the Chaudière-Appalaches region of Canada. Syrups start out lighter and become darker as the season and flavour progresses - our Coles Finest Pure Canadian Maple Syrup has qualities that works well for most eating occasions. An impeccable pancake partner, our Coles Finest Pure Canadian Maple Syrup is great on everything from waffles to Christmas pork or a simply used as a natural sweetener in your coffee, tea and baking. Our Coles Finest Pure Canadian Maple Syrup is happily stored in a dry cool place and therefore, a perfectly sweet pantry staple.
name: Pure Canadian Maple Syrup

long_description:
Coles Finest Basque Cheesecake 750g


  • Traditional Basque cheesecake
  • Made in France
  • Serves 8


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. Experience the difference of this traditional Basque cheesecake that has been expertly crafted in France. This decadent dessert is made with real cream and silky cream cheese then baked to perfection giving it a rich, gooey interior and beautiful golden caramelised exterior. It's irresistibly smooth and creamy with a characteristic bittersweet flavour to the topping.


Perfect for effortless entertaining, Coles Finest Basque Cheesecake keeps in the freezer until you're ready for it. Then just place onto a plate or serving tray to defrost before serving. Try Coles Finest Basque Cheesecake with a berry coulis and fresh blackberries for a perfect balance of flavours that looks almost too good to eat.


Coles Finest Basque Cheesecake is free from artificial colours and flavours and with 8 generous slices it's great for all your dinner parties and holiday get-togethers with family and friends.
name: Basque Cheesecake

long_description:
Coles Finest Glazed Rainbow Carrots 500g


  • Tri-colour carrots
  • Serves 4
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Finest brings you premium products to elevate any occasion. Coles Finest

Glazed Rainbow Carrots are a vibrant mix of orange, purple and yellow carrots grilled to perfection and glazed with herbs and Canadian maple syrup. The result is a delectable pairing that's earthy and slightly sweet with soft and crunchy textures that add depth to any meal.


You can bake Coles Finest Glazed Rainbow Carrots from frozen in the oven or air fryer in just 25 minutes. Then serve alongside your favourite mains. They make a great addition to your roast meats and potato dishes and look stunning served on their own or arranged on a platter with a curl of butter as a centrepiece for your next event or get-together. The all natural colours of Coles Finest Glazed Rainbow Carrots make them a popular choice for kids and their 4.5-star health rating means parents love them too. Serve with a drizzle of aioli or a spiced hummus dip.
name: Rainbow Carrots With Maple Glaze
